Answer: You may have entered incorrect login details. Please enter the correct information and try again.

Question: How do I make changes to my order?
Answer: Currently, there is no provision to modify an order once it is placed. However, you may cancel the order until it is shipped. You can request a return of the cancelled product as per the return policy.

Question: Are there any delivery charges applicable on the orders placed using JioMart?
Answer: A delivery fee is an amount that is charged to a customer, other than the order total, to cover shipping and handling costs. This fee covers the cost of fulfilling the given customer's order, including storage costs, packaging, shipping etc. We are charging a nominal delivery fee of ₹40 on all orders less than a cart value of ₹250 for selected categories in JioMart. We are not charging any delivery fees for orders above ₹250. As a goodwill gesture to our new customer, we do not charge any delivery fee for your first 3 orders. For more details, visit  JioMart FAQ section.

Question: Can I pay online during the delivery of the product?
Answer: Yes, you can pay by scanning the QR available on the invoice using any UPI app at the time of delivery. Please connect with the delivery executive for assistance.

Question: I have placed an order with the Cash on Delivery option. Can I change the payment method now?
Answer: No, the payment method cannot be changed once the order is placed.

Question: What information does the 'My Account' section of JioMart provide?
Answer: In the 'My Account' section, you can view your Personal Information, Order History, and Shopping List.

Question: Why am I unable to see some of my previously added cards?
Answer: All cards added before September 30, 2022, are removed from JioMart. You need to save your cards again as per the new RBI guidelines.

Question: Is it mandatory to save cards with JioMart? What impact will it have on my payment?
Answer: Although it is not mandatory, we highly recommend adding cards for a better payment experience on JioMart. Starting 1st Oct 2022, you will have to input card details each time you want to make a payment unless the card is saved with us.

Question: Can I delete a saved card?
Answer: Yes, you will have the option to remove any saved card with us. However, to save again, you will have to provide your consent to add the card.

Question: How do I provide my consent to save a card?
Answer: When you add a new card, you will see a consent screen requesting you to tap on the ‘Secure & Pay’ button. Simply tap on the button and continue with your payment on that card. Your consent will be successfully captured once the payment is complete.

Question: Do I need to provide consent separately for each card?
Answer: Yes, as per the RBI guidelines, you need to provide consent to save each card separately. You can do the same while making your payment on JioMart.

Question: What is delivery fee? Why am I being charged?
Answer:
A delivery fee is the amount that is charged to a customer, aside from the order total, to cover shipping and handling costs. This fee covers the cost of fulfilling the given order, including storage costs, packaging, shipping, etc. We are charging a nominal delivery fee of Rs.40 on all orders less than a cart value of Rs.250 for selected categories in JioMart. We do not charge any delivery fees for orders above Rs.250. 
   
 As a part of welcoming our new users, we do not charge any delivery fee for the first 3 orders.

Question: Why do I see a delivery fee in my cart?
Answer: A nominal delivery fee of Rs. 40 is charged on orders below Rs. 250. We do not charge delivery fees for orders above Rs. 250.

Question: What is the RelianceOne?
Answer:
RelianceOne or ROne is the Loyalty Program of Reliance Retail with a wide range of privileges and benefits. Members can earn RelianceOne points at all the stores listed below:

 
 JioMart.com 
 JioMartExpress.com 
 Reliancedigital.in 
 AJIO 
 Reliance Fresh 
 Reliance Smart 
 Reliance Smart Point 
 Freshpik 
 Shri Kannan Departmental Store 
 Reliance Jewels 
 Reliance Digital 
 Jio Stores (select products) 
 Reliance Trends (including Trends Man, Trends Woman, Trends Junior, Trends Footwear) 
 Avantra by Trends 
 Reliance Footprint

Question: What are the benefits of RelianceOne?
Answer:
RelianceOne members get access to a wide range of exclusive benefits and privileges across our partner stores. Some of the top benefits include:

 
 Exclusive discounts and offers on your favourite brands and products 
 SMS and email alerts with special offers 
 Loyalty Points on every purchase 
 Redeem Loyalty Points against transactions

Question: How do I know my current balance of ROne points?
Answer: You can know the balance of RelianceOne points by giving a missed call at 8080803580. You will receive an SMS with your current ROne balance.

Question: What is a JioMart Gift Card?
Answer:
A JioMart Gift Card is one of the ways to gift your loved ones. The recipient can choose to redeem the Gift Card by purchasing eligible items from JioMart.com and other Reliance stores. Recipients can enjoy the following advantages with a JioMart Gift Card:

 
 1-click payment. 
 Instant refund 
 100% payment success rate 
 Can be redeemed across eligible JioMart.com products/Reliance stores

Question: How can I purchase a JioMart Gift Card?
Answer: You can use Debit cards, Credit cards, Net banking, and UPI to purchase a JioMart Gift Card. You cannot use cash on delivery or a gift card to purchase another gift card.

Question: What are the ways in which fraudsters may approach customers?
Answer:
It has come to the notice of JioMart that some fraudsters are approaching customers with the following:

 
 Promotional Offers from JioMart 
 Fake email IDs as well as fake domain names/website links which may appear confusingly similar or identical with JioMart and its Group Companies 
 Social media apps such as WhatsApp/Facebook by including the trademark/logo of JioMart and/or the logo ‘B’ as part of their profile picture and pushing fake offers by luring them with false promises

Question: How can customers safeguard themselves from fraudsters?
Answer:
Please exercise caution against fraudsters who may use fake email IDs, fake profiles on social media (WhatsApp, Facebook etc.), domains, websites, telephones, and advertisements in newspapers/magazines, etc. by impersonating themselves to be from JioMart and/or its Group Companies and claim to offer promotional offers, collect customer account details, ask for advance money from process winners, etc.

 
 JioMart or its Group Companies or any of its representatives will NOT call for any advance payment of money from any of its prospects/customers. 
 JioMart or any of its representatives would NOT ask for any OTP or PIN to offer any promotional offers. You are obliged NOT to share OTP/PIN with any person or authorize UPI requests in wallets, received from unknown sources, as the same may lead to fraud, through which, money may be debited from your Bank account and credited to a fraudster’s account. 
 JioMart email ID contains “@jiomart.com” ALONE and does NOT contain any other domain name. 
 Please exercise caution against fraudsters luring you with fictitious offers by calling you over unidentified phone numbers, fake email ids, fake websites/domains and/or through any other physical or electronic medium and styling themselves to be employees/representatives of JioMart and/or its Group Companies. Before dealing with such fraudsters and/or responding/accessing any fraudulent advertisements, telephone calls, emails, and websites, to protect yourself against any fraud and criminal acts of the perpetrators, you are advised to act responsibly and are solely obliged to verify: 
 
   
 by reaching out to the official customer care number of JioMart (1800 890 1222) 
 the veracity of such claims from the company’s official website  https://www.jiomart.com/

Question: What should I do if I become victim of any fraud?
Answer: The general public, existing, and prospective customers are advised to immediately report any suspicious incident to the concerned authorities and to us. Please note that any person dealing with such fraudsters will be dealing at their own risk and responsibility. JioMart and/or any of its Group Company will not be responsible for any loss suffered or otherwise in this respect.

Question: What is JioPOS Lite?
Answer: JioPOS Lite is an app for individuals to become Jio partners, enabling them to do customer recharges.

Question: What are the features of JioPOS Lite?
Answer:
Given below are the features of JioPOS Lite: 
 
 
 Sign up:  Provide Jio mobile number and email ID. 
 Add Money:  Load money in your wallet and earn attractive returns. . 
 Recharge:  Recharge for Jio customers using the money in the wallet. 
 Earning Dashboards:  Easily monitor daily earnings. 
 Passbook:  Check transactions of the last 20 days.

Question: What are the documents required for onboarding on JioPOS Lite?
Answer: You just need an active Jio number and your email ID to get on board.

Question: How to start an online mobile recharge business?
Answer: To start your recharge business, download the JioPOS Lite app from the Play Store and create an account using an active Jio number and email ID. On successful registration, load money into your JioPOS Lite wallet. You can then use your wallet balance to recharge Jio numbers.

Question: What is the commission for the mobile recharge business?
Answer: Your base margin is 2% and currently, Jio is offering an additional 2% margin as an introductory offer. So, your total margin is 4% and you will get the amount immediately at the time of the balance purchase in your wallet.

Question: Is there any enrolment fee for Jio Associates of the JioPOS Lite app?
Answer: Yes, there is a fee of Rs 1000 to join the program. Currently, Jio is not charging this amount as it is waived off for a limited period.

Question: Can I use a non-Jio number for registering on the JioPOS Lite app?
Answer: No, you can register on JioPOS Lite only with an active Jio number.

Question: Am I eligible to subscribe to JioAICloud?
Answer: If you have an active Jio account, you are eligible to subscribe to JioAICloud. JioAICloud offers a wide variety of ways to access the content you have stored in your account (e.g., computer, mobile phone, and web browser).

Question: How do I start using JioAICloud?
Answer:
If you have a Jio account, you do not need to create a separate account for the JioAICloud cloud storage app. The login credentials you use to sign in to MyJio will also be used to sign in to the JioAICloud app. 
To start using this cloud storage app, follow these simple steps:
 
 Download the JioAICloud app from Play Store or App Store. 
 You can also log in to JioAICloud from our website  https://www.jioaicloud.com/ . 
 Enter your Jio User ID and Password to log in. 
 Once the JioAICloud login is complete, you can start uploading and syncing files to use the cloud storage service on the JioAICloud app.

Question: On which devices can I use JioAICloud?
Answer:
JioAICloud is a cloud storage app available on mobile, desktop, and web platforms. 
To use the cloud storage app on a mobile, you require:
 
 Android (OS version 4.2 and above) - Smartphone and Tablet 
 iOS (9.0 and above) - iPhone and iPad 
 
 
 
To use the cloud storage app on a desktop, you require:
 
 Windows 7 (64-bit), Windows 10 (64-bit) 
 Mac OS X 10.10 (Yosemite), 10.11 (El Capitan) and 10.12 (Sierra) 
 
 
To use the cloud storage app on the Web, you require:
 
 Mozilla Firefox - latest two versions. 
 Safari - latest version 
 Google Chrome - latest version.

Question: When I sign in to JioAICloud, do I use the same sign-in information as MyJio?
Answer: Yes, your sign-in credentials for MyJio and  JioAICloud  accounts are the same.

Question: How do I upload files in JioAICloud from my Windows PC or Mac?
Answer: Any file put in the JioAICloud folder directly uploads to cloud. You can also initiate upload by clicking on ‘Move to JioAICloud’ in contextual menu of any file/folder.

Question: I have bought a new phone. How do I restore my old backed-up contacts to my new device?
Answer: To restore your backed-up contacts, go to the 'Contacts' screen and select the 'Restore' option from the menu. You will receive your backed-up contacts on your new phone with device and restoration timestamp details.

Question: Can I share a file saved on JioAICloud as attachment?
Answer: Yes, you can. Select your file and choose 'Send file' in file options and then select the app to send your file as attachment.

Question: What is the storage limit for my JioAICloud account?
Answer:
On signing up for JioAICloud, you get free cloud storage space that is bundled with the plan purchased by you. You can use this space to sync and upload content from your phone.
As a welcome offer, all users get 50 GB of free cloud storage along with full access to all JioAICloud AI features.

Question: Can I access JioAICloud files online?
Answer: Yes. You can access your uploaded files online by logging on to JioAICloud website  https://www.jioaicloud.com/

Question: How do I uninstall JioAICloud from my mobile/desktop?
Answer:
The JioAICloud app can be uninstalled from your phone by deleting it like any other installed app. 
The desktop version for Windows PCs can be uninstalled using the ‘Uninstall’ application in the JioAICloud program files folder. 
The JioAICloud Mac client can be uninstalled by sending the application to 'Trash' and then emptying trash.

Question: How secure is my content on JioAICloud?
Answer: Any access to the data and content on JioAICloud is security validated and protected. Data is in an encrypted format, so another person can’t access your data. The data stored can only be retrieved by authorised system services. The transmission of content happens through a secure channel and the entire environment is continuously monitored and audited for security controls.

Question: Are synced/backed up files removed from my device?
Answer: No, files that are synced continue to remain on your device.

Question: Can I choose between WiFi & mobile data network when connecting to the internet?
Answer:
Yes. To choose the type of network you want to connect to, go to the Settings section of JioAICloud on your device and 
• Select 'WiFi network only' or 'WiFi & Mobile networks' for backups. 
• Next time the JioAICloud app is connected to a particular network, the settings enable all uploads, downloads and sync, as per the option you have selected.

Question: Can I create folders to categorise files on JioAICloud?
Answer: Yes. Folders can be created on both JioAICloud mobile and desktop versions, helping you organize your data better. Please note that JioAICloud automatically creates a folder called 'My Backup' when syncing up your data for the first time.

Question: How often does JioCloud sync data between my JioAICloud account and phone?
Answer:
JioAICloud syncs your account and device when:
 • You click the 'Backup Now' button on the file Backup Screen of the JioAICloud app settings. 
 • Automatic backups take place whenever you update your phone Contacts since the previous backup. 
 • JioAICloud also syncs device data changes at specific intervals.

Question: Why am I not able to see all my phone contacts in the synced Contact list on JioAICloud?
Answer: JioAICloud only syncs your phone and Google contacts. Other contacts on the SIM, Facebook, Whatsapp etc. do not get synced.

Question: Where can I find my files backed up in the older version of JioAICloud (JioDrive)?
Answer: If you had files backed up in the older JioDrive, your files will automatically be transferred to the new JioAICloud app and will be soon available in the ‘My backup' folder. You can check the sync status in the 'Help' section. Your older files can also be accessed from website book.jiodrive.com

Question: Where on my PC will I be able to see all my files synced from JioAICloud?
Answer:
After you log in to the application, ‘JioAICloud’ folder is created at following location in your desktop : 
 
 Mac - Macintosh HD > Users > Machine Name > JioAICloud folder 
 Windows - C: drive > Users > Machine Name > JioAICloud folder 
 
All the files synced with your PC will be available in the ‘JioAICloud’ folder. You can access this folder from JioAICloud system tray icon or from the quick access menu."

Question: How can I share files on Social networking sites (Facebook, Twitter, Google+, YouTube etc.) from my JioAICloud account?
Answer:
You can share files on social networking sites using any of the following methods. On the JioAICloud website: 
• Right click on the photo, video or document that you want to share and click on 'Share'. Files can be shared over email, as a public link, on Facebook, Twitter, Flickr or on Google +. 
• Alternatively, you can select the photo, video or file and click on the share icon in the menu bar for more options. 
 
Through the JioAICloud mobile app: 
• Select the file stored in JioAICloud that you want to share and select the share icon on the menu. You will get an option to Add Recipient and an optional message. A link to your file will be emailed to the recipient. 
• Alternatively, you can select ‘Other methods for Sharing’ to share a link to your file using the messaging apps installed on your phone. When the pop up appears, you can select one of the installed apps and send the file as a link.

Question: How is JioAICloud different from Google Drive, Dropbox, etc?
Answer:
JioAICloud has a bunch of unique features that include: 
• Automatic backup of phone's content, including photos, videos, music, documents, and contacts 
• Single-click upload of content 
• ‘Cloud Address Book’/’Contacts Sync’ with options to merge and restore 
• Flexibility to set up what, how, and when to backup, as per your convenience.

Question: How do I upload media files on my JioAICloud?
Answer:
For Mobile devices, there are two ways in which files can be uploaded:
 
 If you want to upload all your data without having to select the files or content individually, go to settings screen and switch on 'Auto backup' in Auto backup screen and select the file types you want to backup. 
 If you wish to selectively sync photos or video or music or documents, then select ‘Upload (+)’ button on the files screen and select the files you wish to upload. 
 To transfer files from the desktop, move the required file to the JioAICloud folder on your PC or Mac. Files can be uploaded from the web by clicking the ‘Upload files’ option. If you want to upload multiple files or folders at once, you can use the Bulk Uploader available on the JioAICloud website.

Question: How do I back up the folders on my desktop?
Answer:
Given below are the steps to back up the folders on your desktop:
 
 Open the JioAICloud Dashboard on your desktop and click on 'Backup'.. 
 Add the folder you would like to backup. 
 JioAICloud will create a backup of the folder. Even if you accidentally delete any file from your desktop folder, it will be available on the cloud server for you to restore from.

Question: Can I selectively sync certain items from the cloud to my desktop?
Answer: Yes, you can decide which folders you want to sync from your JioAICloud account on your desktop/PC. Folders which are not synced can be accessed from the JioAICloud website or the mobile app.

Question: How do I know if some content on my phone has been backed up to my JioAICloud account?
Answer: JioAICloud automatically uploads all the data for each content type that you have enabled sync for (ex. pictures, videos, etc.). If you have chosen to sync a content type and have space in your account to store it, all the data you have on your phone will get uploaded to JioAICloud automatically.

Question: How do I know how much JioAICloud storage space I have consumed? How do I add more online storage?
Answer: On the JioAICloud mobile, desktop apps, and website, a storage progress bar is available in the 'Settings' screens that displays the amount of storage space you have used up and the total quota available in your account. To add more online storage, select the 'Upgrade' option and follow the instructions displayed.

Question: What is JioChat?
Answer: JioChat is a messaging and video calling app available on Android, iPhone and JioPhone with rich communication features. You can access this application through any internet enabled smartphone (iPhone, Android and JioPhone) over any data network.

Question: How do I register with JioChat?
Answer: After downloading JioChat, enter your mobile number on the sign up page. A 6-digit One-Time Password (OTP) will be sent as an SMS to the mobile number. Once you enter the OTP to verify the mobile number, JioChat will guide you to set-up your personal profile. After setting-up the profile, you can start using JioChat.

Question: What happens if I do not receive the OTP (One Time Password)?
Answer: In case, you do not receive the OTP (One time password), you can request to resend the OTP by simply tapping ‘Resend OTP’ option on the screen. Please wait for one minute before requesting to resend for your OTP.

Question: How do I start chatting with friends on JioChat?
Answer:
You can start chatting on JioChat in following manners: 
  

 For Android: :



 
 Tap on the ‘+’ icon on the bottom right screen on ‘Chats’ tab 
 Now tap on the ‘Chat’ icon. This will show all your contacts and groups under specific tabs 
 Tap on any contact or group to start a conversation 
 You can also initiate a chat with your contacts by tapping on the ‘Contacts’ icon on top right bar. This will show all your contacts, groups and followed channels under specific tabs 
 Tap on any contact or group to start conversation 
 You can also scan your friend’s JioChat QR code and start chatting 
 
 
 For iOS: 
 
 Tap on ‘Contacts’ icon on top right bar. This will show all your contacts, groups and followed channels under specific tabs 
 Tap on any contact or group to start conversation

Question: How do I scan a QR Code on JioChat?
Answer:
For Android: :

 
 Tap on the 3-dot menu available on the ‘Chats’ tab 
 Tap on ‘Scan QR Code’ option to activate the JioChat QR code reader 
 Scan another user’s details by aligning their QR code 
 
 
 For iOS: 
 
 Click on the ‘New Chat’ icon (notepad icon at the top) 
 On the next screen, click on the three dot menu and select ‘Scan QR Code’ option

Question: How do I invite my friends to JioChat?
Answer:
You can invite your friends to JioChat in multiple ways: 
 
 
 In the ‘Chats’ tab, tap on the 3-dot menu 
 Tap on ‘Invite Friends’ 
 Select the medium through which you want to invite your friend on JioChat. You can choose any medium to invite your friends and then select the friend who you want to invite. You can select multiple friends at one go as well 
 
 
 In case a contact has more than one mobile number with the same name, you can tap on the blank circular display pic area of the contact you want to invite. This will open the profile page of the contact. On the profile page, select the rightmost invite icon to send an SMS message to the contact with an invitation and link to download JioChat. Carrier charges as per your SMS plan will apply. 

Note: When you have more than one mobile number saved under the same name, you may click on the icon next to the number to send the SMS to one specific number.

Question: Can I Block a contact on JioChat?
Answer: Yes, you canblock a contact and delete their chats from chat list. Blocked contact will not be able to send a message to you or call you on JioChat.

Question: How do I delete my account from JioChat?
Answer:
Delete account option is available on Account and Privacy page in Settings section for iOS devices (and will be available on other platforms shortly). You can follow the steps there to verify your mobile number and select a reason for deletion before confirming to delete your account. Account Deletion is an irreversible process which cannot be reverted even if you perform it by accident. 

Deleting your account will: 
 
 
 Delete your account information from JioChat 
 Erase your message history 
 Remove you from all your groups 
 Delete all JioChat data from your phone 
 

If you delete your account:



 
 You cannot regain access to the account. 
 It does not affect your information related to the groups you created, or the information other users have relating to you, such as a copy of the messages you sent them 
 We may also keep your information for things like legal issues, terms violations, or harm prevention efforts 
 Logging in with the same mobile number will create a fresh JioChat account without any information history from the deleted account

Question: Are there any charges for sending SMS on JioChat?
Answer: You can enjoy up to 100 free outgoing SMSs per month, with a daily upper limit of 100 messages. Once you exhaust the free quota, you will have to wait till the quota is refilled for the following month. Currently, SMS can only be sent to Indian numbers.

Question: How are groups created on JioChat?
Answer:
For Android: 

To create a new group follow the below mentioned steps:

 
 Tap on the ‘+’ menu on the Chats tab 
 Tap on ‘New Group’ button in the expanded menu. 
 Select the contacts you want to add in the group. 
 Once you have selected the members, click on the ‘tick’ button on top right corner. Now you can set up a name for the group. 
 
 Alternatively, you can create a new group by clicking on the ‘Contacts’ button on top bar and then tapping on ‘Groups’. You can see all the groups you are part of on this page. To make a new group simply tap on the ‘New Group’ icon at the bottom right of the screen. 
 Also, while chatting with your friends, you can click on 3-dot menu and click on ‘Create Group’. A new group will get created with the first member as the friend you were chatting with. 
 
 For iOS: 
 
 Tap on the ‘New Group’ option on the chat screen and select contacts. Alternatively, tap on contacts icon, then tap on ‘Groups’ and select ‘New group’ on top right corner. 
 Also, you can go to Chat Information by tapping on the profile picture of your friend and tap on ‘+’ icon to create a group.

Question: How do I use stickers while chatting with a friend on JioChat?
Answer:
The emoji icon in the left of the typing bar inside the chat window has stickers, GIFs and emojis. To use them follow the below mentioned steps: 
 
 To view all downloads, tap on the 'sticker tab', then select any sticker to send it 
 To acquire new sets simply hit the ‘Store’ icon at the bottom right. This will take you to the Sticker store where you can pick a set, tap 'Download' and add them to your chat window's sticker section

Question: What is a Voice Note and how does it work in JioChat?
Answer:
A Voice Note is a short voice message you can record and send during a chat. 
 To send a voice note follow the below mentioned steps:

 
 In the chat window, tap and hold the ‘microphone’ icon 
 A large sound wave icon will be seen 
 Tap and hold the sound wave icon to record 
 Release your finger to send the message

Question: How do I edit an image and then share via JioChat?
Answer:
By tapping on the ‘Camera’ icon, you can open the camera option, then click a picture. Once the picture is clicked, options to edit the picture will appear as below:

 
 Drawing on the picture 
 Text on the picture 
 Adding emojis on the picture 
 Adding filters on the picture 
 
 After opening the camera, you can also select an existing picture and make the same modification. 
 Same option appears when you tap on the camera icon during a chat or when you select an image from gallery.

Question: Can I broadcast a message to multiple contacts simultaneously?
Answer:
For Android: 
 
 Tap on 3-dot menu and select ‘Broadcast Messages’ 
 Select the contacts you want to broadcast to. After selection of contacts, you can type the message and broadcast 
 
 For iOS: 
 
 Tap on ‘Broadcast Messages’ option on the chat screen 
 Select the contacts you want to broadcast to. After selection of contacts, you can type the message and broadcast

Question: How can I start using video calls through JioChat?
Answer:
To start a video call on JioChat, follow the below mentioned steps:

 
 To start a new call click on ‘+’ menu on ‘Chats’ tab . 
 Tap on ‘Video Call’ icon. This will show all the JioChat contacts 
 Tap on the Video Call icon on the right hand side of your contacts to start a call with them 
 
 You can also tap on the profile picture of the contact and press Video Call icon to start a video call. In case you are chatting with a friend and want to make a video call, tap the ‘Video Call’ icon on the horizontal menu on the top of the chat window. 
 You can also make a video call to recently contacted contact from Calls tab by tapping on the video call icon next to the contact’s information. 
 If you have previously initiated a chat with a friend, they get listed on the ‘Chats’ tab. Look for their name on ‘Chats’ tab by either scrolling or by using search feature and click on the Video Call icon next to their name. 
 Once a contact accepts the call, the video call begins and you can see your friend along with a small video feed of yourself. 
 Note: It is recommended that video calls are made on a wireless LAN or Wi-Fi network or a 3G, 4G or 5G operator network.

Question: What is Conference Room in JioChat?
Answer: Conference Room is a cool new feature in JioChat which enables 5-member group video calling. You can create any number of Conference Rooms and the rooms will remain on the app, just like groups for chat. Tapping on the room starts the group video call with your friends in the room.

Question: How do I create a Conference Room on JioChat?
Answer:
To create a Conference Room follow the below mentioned steps:

 
 In the calls tab, tap on the first box named ‘New Conference’ to create a new Conference Room. 
 Now add up to 4 of your contacts to start the room. Notification will be sent to the contacts to join the room and once any of your invitees joins, the video call will begin. 
 
 If any of your invitees do not have the new version of JioChat app which supports Conference Rooms, a chat message will be sent on your behalf suggesting app update to join the room. 
 There are quick buttons on the on Calls & Chats pages for Android and on Calls page for iOS to create a Conference Room.

Question: Can I make a call from JioChat on Smartphone to JioPhone?
Answer: Yes, you can make a call from JioChat to JioVideoCall app on JioPhone. The receiver will receive the call on JioVideoCall app on his JioPhone.

Question: What are JioChat Channels?
Answer: JioChat channels are the cool way to connect with your favourite brands and celebrities through a chat interface. You can follow a JioChat channel to receive content shared on the channel and to chat with them.

Question: How do I follow a channel on JioChat?
Answer:
There are multiple ways to follow a channel:

 
 Search Channel: Tap on Channels tab to either follow recommended channels or tap on the List icon at the top right to go to list of all channels. Now, follow any of the channels from the list or use search icon on the top bar to search any specific channel. Tap on 'Follow' on the list or on channel info page to follow the channel. 
 Scan QR code: Open 3-dot menu and tap on Scan QR Code. Scan a channel QR code to reach channel info page. Tap on 'Follow' to start following. 
 Shared Channel contact card: When a friend shares JioChat contact card with you, tap on contact card to reach channel info page. Tap 'Follow' to start following.

Question: What are JioChat stories?
Answer: Stories section allows you to explore the exciting video stories from top media brands, specially curated for you. Check out the daily short video stories for a rich, full-screen natural viewing experience.

Question: Can I share any JioChat stories with my friends?
Answer: When you open a story, ‘Share’ icon is visible on the bottom right corner. Tap on it, to choose any other app to share the story.

Question: How do I hide my last seen status on JioChat?
Answer:
Last seen time is automatically shown to users of JioChat who have your number in their contact book.

Question: What payment options are supported by the JioHealthHub (JHH) app?
Answer: The JioHealthHub app supports all types of payments via Jio Wallet, Credit/Debit Card and Net Banking, depending on the type of service being ordered. You can also opt for the Pay-on-visit feature (subject to provider and other terms & conditions).

Question: What is the refund policy for online payments?
Answer: The time taken for a refund depends on the instrument used for making the payment. For transactions paid using Credit Card, Debit Card or Net Banking, the refund should reflect in your account in approximately 5 to 7 business days from the time of refund initiation. In the case of wallets, the refund may be expected earlier. Cancellation charges can apply depending on the service provider.

Question: What taxes will I be charged?
Answer: All taxes will be included in the final payment. You can find details of the same in your invoice. The usage of the app is free of cost to the user unless explicitly mentioned.

Question: How long will it take for a refund to reach my account?
Answer: The time taken for a refund depends on the mode used for making the payment. For transactions paid using Credit Card, Debit Card or Net Banking, the refund should reflect in your account in approximately 5 to 7 business days from the time of refund initiation. In the case of wallets, the refund may be expected earlier.

Question: What is Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA)?
Answer: The Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) aims to develop the backbone necessary to support the integrated digital health infrastructure of the country. The purpose of the Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA) lies in uniquely identifying persons, authenticating them, and threading their health records (only with their informed consent) across multiple systems and stakeholders. For more information, please  visit

Question: Is it mandatory to have an Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA) to avail JioHealthHub services?
Answer: No, JioHealthHub is an independent healthcare platform which provides various services such as consultation with a doctor, booking a lab test, including managing and monitoring the health of self and family through HealthPatri. ABHA is a means to enable a single identity for each user to ensure hassle-free usage of healthcare facilities.

Question: Can the Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA) be mapped to multiple JioHealthHub IDs with one Aadhar number?
Answer: No, your Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA) is created by using your basic details in addition to your mobile number and Aadhaar number. Your ABHA will be unique to you and you will have the option to avail benefits from the Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM).

Question: Do I have to submit any physical documents to enrol in ABHA?
Answer: No, you are not required to submit any physical documents. Enrolment in ABHA is paperless and hassle-free.

Question: Can I cancel/reschedule a booking?
Answer:
Yes, you can cancel/reschedule a booking by following the below steps. 
 
 
 Login to the JioHealthHub app. 
 Tap on ‘My Health’ -> Go to ‘My Consults’ and press ‘Upcoming Consultation(s)’. 
 Select the appointment to be cancelled. 
 Press ‘Cancel’ at the bottom and add a reason for cancellation. 
 Press ‘Confirm’ and the appointment will be cancelled. 
 
 
 Steps to Reschedule a booking:

 
 Login to the JioHealthHub app. 
 Tap on My Health -> Go to ‘My Consults’ and tap on ‘Upcoming Consultation(s)’. 
 Select the appointment to be rescheduled. 
 Tap on “Reschedule” at the bottom and add a reason for rescheduling. 
 Choose the next preferred slot and confirm.

Question: Where can I see my upcoming or past appointments/consultations?
Answer:
You can access the upcoming or past appointments/consultations by simply following the steps below: 
 
 
 Tap on the ‘Consult with doctors online’ option shown on the home page 
 Directly scroll down to the ‘My Consult’ section or select ‘My Health’ at the bottom of the home screen and tap on ‘My Consult’.

Question: What if the doctor missed the call?
Answer: JioHealthHub takes various measures to ensure on-time service delivery. In cases when doctors are unable to attend the consultation, a refund (if applicable) will be initiated for the users.

Question: Will I get an invoice for online payments?
Answer: Yes, for online doctor consultations with Reliance Foundation Hospital (RFH), a digital copy of the invoice of payment will be sent through the email ID associated with the Medical Registration Number (MRN) used at the time of payment after the successful completion of the consultation. For diagnostic service booking, a physical payment invoice will be provided to you after sample collection.

Question: How do I change the PIN of my JioHealthHub account?

Question: I want to change my mobile number to log in to the app. What should I do?

You can change the mobile number using the steps below:

 Tap on the ‘Profile’ option present in the bottom right corner.

 Enter the PIN on this page. 
 Now enter the new number which needs to be changed. You will receive an OTP on the number which needs to be updated. Note: Please ensure the new number is not linked to an already existing JioHealthHub account.

Question: How can I add my family members to my JioHealthHub profile?

Follow the below steps to add your family members to your profile:

 
 Login to the JioHealthHub app. 
 Tap on the ‘Add’ icon at the top left corner of the home page.

Question: How do I add my Employee ID with the JioHealthHub app?

You can add your Employee ID in a few simple steps:

 
 Tap on ‘Manage Identity’ on the home page. 
 Press ‘Link New Identity’.

Question: What is Health Patri?
Answer: Health Patri is a health insights dashboard that indicates the health status of a user based on around 200 diagnostic and lifestyle health parameters. The Red, Yellow, and Green colours are simple indicators of whether the user is falling within the normal physiological ranges of the parameters to identify where attention is needed.

Question: How do I add my data to the JioHealthHub app?

There are multiple ways in which you can add/update data:

 
 Manually enter the data field. 
 Allow JioHealthHub to access your medical/fitness device and sync data from that device. 
 When you book a lab test via JioHealthHub, the lab test data flows into Health Patri (if you have provided consent).

Question: How safe is my data from getting hacked?
Answer: We employ the best practices to make sure that your data is safe and secure. Data is end-to-end encrypted both at our server and at the application end, to ensure minimal chances of any data getting hacked.

Question: How do I connect a device?

Question: Does JioHealthHub endorse the content shared on its platform?
Answer: No, we do not recommend, own or endorse any information related to tests, procedures, lifestyle, etc., shared on the platform. The information, views, and opinions expressed in it are owned by the content providers and authors.

Question: Can the information shared in the Health Feed be treated as medical advice?
Answer: The content available on the platform is strictly for informational purposes. It should not be deemed as an alternative or substitute to professional medical advice, diagnosis or treatment. Always seek guidance from a qualified medical practitioner.

Question: What is Jio STB remote?

All features and key functions of the physical remote are included in this mobile app to enhance your overall experience. The STB Remote works seamlessly after pairing it with the JioSTB. Depending on the JioSTB variant, this mobile remote app works either over Bluetooth.

Question: On what devices can I use the STB remote?

Question: What is required to start using the STB Remote?

To start using the STB Remote, you will need: 
 
 An active JioFiber/Air Fiber connection.

 The JioHome application installed on your handheld device.

Question: Do I need to be connected to the Internet to use the STB Remote?

 Open the STB Remote app and scan for the JioSTB.

Question: What is Gamepad?

Question: How can I open Gamepad?

 Manually : Tap the  Gamepad  button on the homepage of the STB Remote screen (available when paired through Bluetooth).

If you click the  Back  icon in the Gamepad:

Question: What is a Guest Password?
Answer:
A Guest Password is an additional password for the same Wi-Fi network, with an expiry time that you can set. Guests can connect to the Wi-Fi network only for the specified time. You can change the Guest Password anytime. This feature is currently supported for AirFiber connections. To set a Guest Password: 
 
 Log in to the JioHome application with your registered mobile number. 
 Select  Network  and then select  Guest  to set the Guest Password.

Question: How do I perform an internet speed test for my JioHome?
Answer:
The easiest way to check your internet speed on JioHome is through the JioHome app. It provides the most accurate reading for your home setup, whether you need a quick internet speed test, a more comprehensive network speed test, or a simple network speed test to check how things are performing. You can also use it when you specifically want to check the internet speed, run a wi-fi speed test, or just check wi-fi speed before troubleshooting. 
 Here’s how you can run a speed test on your JioHome: 
 • Open the JioHome app on your phone. 
 • Tap on 'Speed Test' to start an instant data speed test. 
 • You can also go to Network → Wi-Fi Speed to view your last recorded speed and tap 'Test Speed' for a fresh check. 
 If you're using a Wi-Fi Router (JioFiber or JioAirFiber): 
 Select 'Router', then hit 'Test Speed' to run a reliable broadband speed test. This shows how much speed actually reaches your router — super useful for troubleshooting and performing an accurate wi-fi speed test anytime. 
 If you're checking speed on your mobile phone: 
 Select 'Mobile Phone', make sure you're connected to your Jio Wi-Fi, and tap 'Test Speed'. Great for a “What’s my speed right now?” moment or a quick my net speed test, especially if you want to check the internet speed instantly. 
 Want to compare results? 
 You can use any online tool to run a speed test online, a net speed test online, or an internet speed test. These are helpful for a quick reference, but the JioHome app gives you the most accurate numbers because it measures speed directly from your Jio setup — making it more reliable than most generic check wi-fi speed websites. 
 Pro Tip: 
 If you're on a True 5G phone connected to Jio Wi-Fi, your Wi-Fi experience can also reflect 5G backhaul performance. So running a 5G speed test on mobile data vs. Wi-Fi can help you understand the difference — especially when comparing results after doing a wi-fi speed test.

Question: What is a JioExtender?
Answer:
JioExtender is a device that extends the Wi-Fi range within your home. To add a JioExtender to your network: 
 
 Press the  + button on the landing page of the JioHome application. 
 Select  WiFi Extender and follow the on-screen instructions to link the JioExtender device to your network. 
 
 These steps should help you manage your Wi-Fi settings and enhance your network experience using the JioHome application. If you have any more questions, feel free to ask!

Question: What is Parental Control?
Answer: Parental Control is a feature currently available for Jio AirFiber users only. It acts as a digital guardian, helping you manage and control devices connected to your network. You can view security threats, block internet access, or set time-based internet restrictions on your family members' devices.

Question: Do I need to be connected to WiFi to manage devices?
Answer: No, you do not need to be connected to your router's WiFi to manage devices. You can manage parental rules for devices connected to the network from anywhere, anytime. However, you need to be connected to WiFi when managing a device locally.

Question: What devices can be managed using Parental Control?
Answer:
Parental Control can manage a wide range of devices connected to your WiFi router via WiFi or LAN cable. This includes: 
 
 Mobile phones 
 Laptops 
 Desktops 
 Printers 
 Smart TVs 
 Smart home appliances 
 Smart speakers 
 IoT devices 
 Sensors 
 And more

Question: How do I create a ‘Profile’ on Parental Control?
Answer:
To create a user profile on Parental Control: 
 
 Tap  Create new user on the Parental Control home screen. 
 Enter the user's name and select the desired access profile from the three categories: Adult, Teen, and Kids. 
 Click on the  Create

Question: How do I link device(s) to a user?
Answer:
To link devices to a user, you have two options: 
 
 On the home screen of Parental Control, go to the user section, click on the three dots, and select  Link device(s) to link the device(s) to the user. 
 On the home screen of Parental Control, go to the devices section, click on the three dots, and select  Link this device to to link it to a user.

Question: How can I block internet access for my kids/other family members' devices?
Answer:
There are two ways to block internet access: 
 
 Complete Internet Block : Select the active/connected device from the device list, click on the three dots, and select  Block . 
 Time-Based Internet Blocking : Select the user you want to control, click on the three dots, select  Parental Control , enable  Internet block time , and set your desired schedule.

Question: How can I unblock internet access for my kids/other family members' devices?
Answer:
To unblock devices: 
 
 For devices with a complete internet block, select the blocked device, click on the three dots, and choose  Unblock . 
 If you've set up time-based internet blocking, select the user whose device needs unblocking, click on the three dots, select  Parental Control , and disable  Internet block time to grant access.

Question: Why is the website/application I am trying to access being blocked by Parental Control?
Answer: Parental Control blocks websites and applications that could be harmful, such as those containing malware or spyware. It acts as a digital security guard for your internet.

Question: Why don't parental control rules work on my kid's device, and why does it say it's offline?
Answer:
This issue occurs because devices can change their identity (MAC Address) when they connect to the internet. The router may take some time to map the old and new device identities. During this period, certain features like parental controls might not work. Once the new device is identified as the old device, parental controls will start working again. However, the rules won't apply until the device is properly recognized. 
 These FAQs should help you understand and use the Parental Control feature effectively. If you have any more questions, feel free to ask!

Question: What is the SmartHome feature in the JioHome application?
Answer:
The SmartHome feature in the JioHome application is Jio's home automation solution. It allows users with smart home devices and either a Jio Smart Hub-Mini or Jio Smart Hub to:

 Get Device Information : Access detailed information about the status and performance of your smart devices. 
 Automate Settings : Create automated routines to turn devices on or off based on your preferences for different scenarios and times of day. 
 
 This feature helps you streamline and enhance your daily life by making your home smarter and more efficient

Question: What are Jio Smart Hub – Mini and Jio Smart Hub concerning the SmartHome feature of JioHome?

 Jio Smart Hub : This device is designed for users with non-Jio ONT/Routers, allowing them to access smart home automation features through the JioHome application.

Question: How do I start using the SmartHome feature of the JioHome application?

 For non-Jio ONT/Router: Use the Jio Smart Hub.

 First-time users : Create a new account. 
 Returning users : Log in with your existing account. 
 
 
 
 Once logged in, access the SmartHome feature from the bottom of the home screen. Follow the setup instructions to create your home profile and add your smart devices. You can then control and automate your devices from the app.

Question: While setting up the SmartHome feature in the JioHome application a serial number is requested, where can that be found?
Answer:
For Jio ONT/Router users with a Jio Smart Hub-Mini :
 
 The serial number you need is the MAC ID, which is located at the bottom of your Jio ONT/Router. 
 
 
 For Jio Smart Hub users :

Question: How can smart home devices be associated to a SmartHome account under JioHome?

 For WPS Devices :

Question: Do I need to be connected to the Internet to use the SmartHome feature of JioHome?
Answer: Yes, an internet connection is required to log in to the JioHome application. However, if your mobile device and the smart hub are connected to the same Wi-Fi network, you can control your smart devices without an active internet connection.

Question: What should I do if the screen gets stuck on setup mode while using the SmartHome feature of JioHome?
Answer: The setup mode screen appears when devices are being added or removed from SmartHome. This screen will automatically return to normal once the process is complete. During this time, no other actions can be performed. It is recommended to wait until the addition or removal is finished.

Question: Is it possible to replace an existing device added to the SmartHome account under JioHome with a new one?

 If the device is AC-powered, check the power supply. 
 
 
 Replace the Device :
 
 If the device remains offline, go to the device details page in the JioHome app. 
 Click on the settings menu and select the  Replace

 These steps will help you seamlessly replace your offline device with a new one.

Question: Can I remove added smart home devices from the SmartHome section in JioHome?
Answer:
Yes, you can remove smart home devices from the SmartHome section in the JioHome application. Here’s how: 
 
 Go to the  device details page for the device you want to remove.

Question: What all devices can be added to the SmartHome application?
Answer: For optimal performance, it is recommended to use smart home devices from Jio when adding them to your SmartHome account in the JioHome application. These devices are designed to work seamlessly with the SmartHome feature, ensuring a smooth and efficient home automation experience.

Question: While using the SmartHome feature of the JioHome application, my smart device status is shown as offline, what shall I do?

 If the Issue Persists :

Question: How can I add a smart device shortcut tile on the SmartHome feature main page under the JioHome application?

Question: Where can I see the device shortcuts of SmartHome and JioHome when I change my mobile device?

Question: Can I access and control my smart devices from a long distance and outside the home network using the SmartHome feature under JioHome?

Question: How can I enable notifications for the added devices in SmartHome under the JioHome application?

To enable notifications for your smart devices:

Question: What is the Alert Notification in the SmartHome feature of the JioHome application?
Answer: The Alert Notification section is crucial for notifying users about adverse or critical scenarios, such as safety and security breaches or malfunctions of smart devices. This ensures you are promptly informed about any important issues with your smart home setup.

Question: What is the Automation feature in SmartHome under the JioHome application?
Answer: The Automation feature allows you to set rules for your smart home devices to operate automatically based on your preferences. For example, you can schedule a light to turn on or off at a specific time each day. This helps in creating a more convenient and efficient home environment.

Question: Can I control my smart home devices using voice commands in the SmartHome feature of JioHome?
Answer: Yes, you can control all smart devices added to SmartHome using voice commands through Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa. Detailed instructions for linking these voice assistants to your SmartHome account can be found in the profile section of the JioHome application. This makes managing your smart home even more convenient and hands-free.

Question: How can I start using the JioSaavn app?
Answer: Simple! Just head over to ​Google Play Store​ or ​iOS App Store​ and download the music app JioSaavn. If you’re a new user, create a free account to listen songs online. If you already have a Saavn or JioMusic account, just log in with the same information as always to enjoy your favorite music online.

Question: Is JioSaavn still free?
Answer: Yes, JioSaavn is still free to listen to songs, create playlists, manage your music library, get recommendations, set JioTunes, and so much more.

Question: Is JioTunes still available?
Answer: Yes, all your JioTunes are still here. Tap on the JioTune icon next to any song and tap on the ‘Set’ option to set the same as your JioTune.

Question: I currently use Saavn or JioMusic. Will all my playlists and downloads still be here?
Answer: Yes, don’t worry! Your music, playlists, downloads, and even your JioTunes are all safe with us. Get the new JioSaavn app, and log in with the same Saavn or JioMusic account as always. ​If you’re a JioMusic user, make sure you log in while connected to cellular data on your Jio network to be certain we can copy your music.

Question: What are the subscription packs in JioSaavn?
Answer: You can choose from Pro, JioTunes and Pro Student packs which are available across various validity and price points.

Question: Do I have to pay for using features in JioSaavn?
Answer: Download JioSaavn music app with the Jio network to get all the features of JioSaavn Pro free for the first 30 days! After that, you can always continue to play songs online for free with ads. If you choose to subscribe to JioSaavn Pro music app, you’ll receive no ads while you listen songs online, unlimited downloads, and the ability to listen offline and you can enjoy music online with highest quality audio.

Question: My downloads are missing in JioSaavn. How do I get them back?
Answer: If you are on Android, simply make sure you are connected over the Jio cellular network and then relaunch the app. Your downloads should copy automatically! In case you are still having difficulty, go to  ‘Settings’, select ‘Pro Options’ and then choose ‘Sync Downloads’.  This will get everything back, right where you left it!

Question: How do I get my 30 day free trial of JioSaavn Pro?
Answer: Easy! First, you must be a Jio network user to enjoy premium features of the music app during 30-day free trial period. Simply log in while connected to cellular data on your Jio network, and your trial will start automatically. Once you login you can enjoy music online without any extra cost.

Question: Does JioSaavn work internationally?
Answer: JioSaavn is available worldwide. You can listen to songs for free in India and across South Asia. In other regions, you will need an active JioSaavn Pro subscription. Content availability varies from one country to another. You can read more about it by clicking  ​here​.

Question: My Playlists are missing in JioSaavn. How do I get them back?
Answer: If you're coming from a JioMusic account, make sure you connect over cellular on the Jio network, and then relaunch the app. Your music will copy automatically. If you’re coming from a Saavn account, you may be logged in to a Jio account instead. Go to Settings > Edit Profile ​​ and add the email, phone, or Facebook account you used to log in to Saavn. We’ll combine your data.

Question: Do you have English and International content in JioSaavn?
Answer: Yes, in addition to Bollywood, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Punjabi, and all your regional favourites, we have English hits as well! Over 80 million songs, to be precise. Please note: English content is available only in India, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Bahrain, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Maldives, Nepal, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Sri Lanka, UAE, and Yemen.

Question: I am already a JioSaavn Pro subscriber. Does anything change?
Answer: If you are an existing JioSaavn Pro subscriber, log in to your JioSaavn account and your subscription will continue uninterrupted. Even your billing remains the same. However, your invoices will now be issued by JioSaavn.

Question: How do I login to the JioSaavn app?
Answer: You can login to JioSaavn using your mobile number, Facebook, Google account, Apple Login (for Apple Devices) and Email.

Question: What are the devices on which I can listen to JioSaavn?
Answer: You can listen to JioSaavn on Android, iOS, KaiOS, STBs, TVs, MyJio (mini app) and connected vehicles.

Question: Can I buy ringtones on JioSaavn?
Answer: Yes, you can buy ringtones for limited songs on JioSaavn. Just tap on the ‘JioTune’ icon, tap on the ‘Ringtone’ option at the top and ‘Buy’ at Rs.5 /ringtone.

Question: I am already a Saavn Pro subscriber. Does anything change?
Answer: Great! If you’re an existing Saavn Pro subscriber, log in to your Saavn account and your subscription will continue uninterrupted. Even your billing remains exactly the same, except that your invoices will now be issued by JioSaavn.

Question: What are the payment options to buy the packs?
Answer: You can buy packs via UPI, Debit Cards, Credit Cards, Wallets, Net banking, and Pay Later options.

Question: Can I set Unlimited JioTunes from JioSaavn?
Answer: Ideally, 1 JioTune is free per user every month. For setting unlimited JioTunes every month, you can buy JioTunes+ subscription packs from the JioSaavn app.

Question: What is JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: The JioSmartLiving (JSL) app is an automation solution for smart home devices. The JSL app allows you to monitor, control and get information on all the smart devices installed at home. You can also create automated settings that turn on/off smart devices as per your preference.

Question: How do I start using JioSmartLiving app?
Answer:
To start using the application, you can follow these steps: 
 
 
 Download the  JioSmartLiving  app from the  App Store  or  Play Store . 
 Login with your mobile number and enter the OTP received. 
 If you are the first-time user, then you need to set up a  Home  account. There are two options to set up the same:

	 
 If you are onboarding only Wi-Fi devices, then please select  Only for WiFi device  option. 
 If you have Physical hub/gateway or mini hub, then please select  By Physical Hub/Gateway  option. 
 
 
 
 
 After following the steps on the screen,  Home  account would get created and you would be able to onboard devices, access, and view status of devices.

Question: What are Smart Hub and Smart Mini Hub options in JioSmartLiving?
Answer:
Both, Smart Hub and Smart Mini Hub act as interfaces between your smart home devices and your SmartLiving account on the JioSmartLiving app. 
  

 Smart Hub is a device that works as a medium for communication between devices, user, and cloud. This device works on internet from any medium i.e. via Ethernet, Wi-Fi or Hotspot. 

 



 Smart Mini Hub is a device that resembles a USB and is provided along with the Jio Router/Gateway. It has a LED indicator on one end that changes colour as per the different device modes. This is an exclusive device provided with Jio Routers so that Jio users don’t have to buy additional Hub to onboard devices.

Question: While setting up the JioSmartLiving app, a serial number is requested, where can I find that?
Answer: For users of Jio Router/Gateway with a connected Smart Hub Mini, the serial number requested to complete account creation is the MAC ID mentioned at the bottom of the Jio Router/Gateway. For Smart Hub, the serial number and other details would be available on a printed pamphlet available within the box.

Question: Do I need to be connect to the internet to use the JioSmartLiving?
Answer: You need a proper internet connection to login to the JioSmartLiving app. If the mobile and smart hub are connected to the same Wi-Fi network, you can control your added smart devices without connecting to the internet.

Question: What is the use of admin PIN in the JioSmartLiving app and can I reset the admin PIN?
Answer:
The admin PIN is the master control required to operate all key features on JioSmartLiving, like Add / Modify / Delete devices, scenes, and users.  Admin PIN  can be accessed from the  Profile  section in the  side menu  of the JioSmartLiving app. 
  

 • To reset admin PIN, go to  Side-menu > Accounts > Admin Mode  and Select the  Forgot PIN  option. Follow the instructions prompted on the screen. 
 • To change the admin PIN, go to  Side-menu > Accounts > Admin Mode  and select the  Change PIN  option. Follow the instructions prompted on the screen.

Question: What can I do when the screen gets stuck on setup mode while using the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: The setup mode screen is displayed when devices are being added or removed from JioSmartLiving. This screen will automatically change back to normal once the actions are completed. No other action can be performed while the screen is in setup mode and you should wait until the addition/removal is completed.

Question: Is it possible to replace an existing device added on the JioSmartLiving app with a new one?
Answer:
Yes it is possible if the device supports Replace functionality, you would see an option named Replace under 3 dots menu of the device. 
 Go to the Device Details screen and select 3 dots menu, if Replace option appears then that specific device can be replaced with another to re-use the set automation rules and scenes. Just follow the onscreen instructions to replace the faulty offline device with a new device with the same make and model number. 
 Please Note : This functionality works only if the device is offline.

Question: While using the JioSmartLiving app, device status is shown as offline, what shall I do?
Answer:
Please follow the below guide for that:

 
 If the device is powered by electricity, please check the power supply to the device. 
 If the device is battery-powered, then battery might need to be replaced. 
 If the device is connected via Smart Hub, then check the power supply and internet connection to the Hub. 
 If the device is connected via Smart Mini Hub, then check whether the Hub is properly connected to the Jio Router. 
 If it is connected properly, then check the power supply and internet connection to the Jio Router. With all the proper connections, the hub’s LED light should be stable blue. 
 If the problem persists despite the above checks, please contact Support Centre for resolution.

Question: Can I delete the smart home devices from the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: Yes. To delete the device, go to the Device Details screen, tap the 3 dots menu and select the Delete option. The device will be removed from the user’s list of smart devices.

Question: How can I add a smart device shortcut tile on the main page under the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: For quick access to favourite smart devices added to the JioSmartLiving app, tap the 3 dots menu of Device Details page and select the Edit option. On the Edit Device page, enable the Quick access on Dashboard option. Shortcuts are created locally on the mobile devices and will need to be re-created every time the mobile device is changed.

Question: Can I access and control my smart devices remotely using the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: Yes, if the smart home devices and mobile phone with JioSmartLiving app are connected to the internet, users can control smart devices remotely.

Question: How can I enable notifications for the added devices in the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: To enable the notifications, tap on the 3 dots menu on device details page and select the Edit option. On the Edit Device page, enable the Notifications option. To access the Notification Settings, go to Settings under side-menu on the dashboard and select the required category for the notifications.

Question: What is lighting control in the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: It is the group control of all the lighting and outlet connected devices in the smart home. Through this feature, you can define and run control operations for a group of smart lights. e.g., turn on all bulbs with green colour or turn on or off all bulbs in one go.

Question: What is the Alert Notification in the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: This is the specific type of notification when adverse/critical scenarios of safety, security breach and malfunction of smart devices happen.

Question: Can I control my home devices with more than one mobile device and can somebody else also control my devices from JioSmartLiving?
Answer:
Yes. You can control your home devices by logging in to the JioSmartLiving app using the same account. 
 JioSmartLiving allows home/account owner to add secondary user. Secondary user can log in to JioSmartLiving application using the primary account details. 
 To add a secondary user, go to Side-Menu > Accounts > Admin Mode and enter admin PIN to manage accounts. Add mobile number of the secondary user to be added. Enter the OTP received on the mobile number of the user to be added.

Question: What is the Scene feature in the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: Scenes are the rules defined by users in which they want their smart home devices to work automatically e.g., switch on or off bulb at a particular time on a daily basis.

Question: Can I control my smart home devices using voice commands in the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer: Yes, all the smart devices added in the JioSmartLiving app can be controlled using Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa.

Question: What to do when the JioSmartLiving account gets locked?
Answer: The JioSmartLiving account gets locked when an incorrect admin PIN is entered 3 times in a row. Only the home/account owner has the option to unlock the account after entering the correct admin PIN.

Question: How can I add Wi-Fi devices to the JioSmartLiving app?
Answer:
Follow these steps to start controlling your smart Wi-Fi devices through the app: 
  

 
 
 Ensure that your Wi-Fi device is in the pairing mode (Check device manual for more details.) 
 Tap on  Add Device  and follow the instructions that displays on the screen. 
 
 

 



 Please Note : Your Wi-Fi device should be connected only to the 2.4GHz band of your Wi-Fi network.

Question: What should I do if no Wi-Fi device is found during the scanning process?
Answer: You should ensure that your Wi-Fi device is in the pairing mode and your mobile device with the app is near to it. Wi-Fi devices can only be added when the pairing mode is enabled.

Question: Can I connect the Wi-Fi device using a 5 GHz Wi-Fi network?
Answer: No. The current Wi-Fi devices work only with 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi network and will not be able to connect to a 5 GHz network.

Question: Do the Wi-Fi devices support Wi-Fi reconfiguration and addition to a new router?
Answer:
Yes, both Wi-Fi settings change and router change are supported by the Wi-Fi devices and can be done through the following steps: 
 
 
 Enable the  Network Change  mode of the WiFi device. Check device manual for more details. 
 On the  Device details  screen, tap the  3 dots menu  and select the  Wi-Fi Settings  option. 
 Re-configure the network credentials i.e. Wi-Fi SSID or password.

Question: What should I do if the Wi-Fi device appears to be offline in the app?
Answer:
Here are a couple of checks to do in case your Wi-Fi devices do not appear as active on the app: 
 
 
 Router check:  Ensure that the router to which Wi-Fi devices are connected is powered On. 
 Network check:   Ensure active internet is available for the router. In case, Wi-Fi name or password has been changed, ensure Wi-Fi reconfiguration is done on the Wi-Fi device.

Question: Can I access offline WiFi device from JioSmartLiving app?
Answer:
When the app and Smart devices are not connected to the same WiFi network, then you can’t access the devices if there is no internet available for the WiFi devices.  
 In case of no internet connectivity, you can access the devices by connecting your mobile phone with JioSmartLiving app to the same WiFi network to which devices are connected via Smart Hub or Smart Mini-Hub.

Question: How can I start using JioNews?
Answer:
Currently, JioNews is available for smartphones, JioPhones, and iPads. You can also visit the JioNews website ( www.jionews.com ). 
 To download JioNews on your preferred device, click the required link: 
 Android :  Download 
 IOS:  Download 
 Website:  www.jionews.com

Question: I am not a Jio user. Can I access all premium features on JioNews?
Answer: Non-Jio users can access all the features in the app by simply logging in to the app during the trial period. However, Jio users will have premium access to all the features on JioNews.

Question: What are the languages that are available on JioNews?
Answer: Currently, JioNews content is available in 13+ languages (English, Hindi, Marathi, Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam, Kannada, Bangla, Urdu, Punjabi, Assamese, and Odia).

Question: What is JioTranslate?
Answer: JioTranslate is a user-friendly translation app that allows you to translate text, speech, and voice calls in real time. It supports multiple languages and offers accurate translations for various purposes  download now

Question: How does JioTranslate work?
Answer: JioTranslate utilises advanced machine learning algorithms to analyse and translate text, speech, and images instantly. It employs state-of-the-art language processing techniques to ensure accurate and natural translations.

Question: Which languages does JioTranslate support?
Answer: JioTranslate supports a wide range of languages, including but not limited to English, Hindi, Gujarati, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi, Tamil, Malayalam, Bangla, Assamese, Spanish, French, German, and other major indic languages.

Question: Can I translate speeches with JioTranslate?
Answer: Yes, JioTranslate allows you to translate spoken language in real time. Simply speak into the app, and it will provide instant translations into your desired language. This feature is particularly useful for conversations and verbal communication.

Question: Can I share translated texts with others using JioTranslate?
Answer: Absolutely! JioTranslate allows you to share translated texts with others via WhatsApp or other messaging apps. Simply select the translated text within the app and choose the desired messaging app to share it with your contacts

Question: How does real-time voice call translation work on JioTranslate?
Answer: Real-time voice call translation on JioTranslate allows users to make voice calls to individuals who speak a different language and have their speech translated instantly during the call. Users can speak in their native language, and the app will translate their speech into the desired language for the recipient in real time.

Question: Is there a limit to the duration of real-time voice calls on JioTranslate?
Answer: There is no specific duration limit for real-time voice calls on JioTranslate. Users can make voice calls and engage in conversations for as long as they like, subject to the availability of internet connectivity and sufficient battery life on their devices.

Question: Can I use JioTranslate for free?
Answer: Yes, JioTranslate is available for free download and use on compatible devices. However, certain advanced features or language packs may require a subscription or in-app purchase.

Question: How accurate are the translations provided by JioTranslate?
Answer: JioTranslate strives to provide accurate translations across multiple languages. While it employs advanced algorithms and technology to ensure accuracy, translations may vary depending on factors such as context, dialects, and language nuances.

Question: Can I use JioTranslate for professional or business purposes?
Answer: Yes, JioTranslate can be used for professional and business purposes, such as international communication, document translation, and multilingual presentations. It offers convenience and efficiency for individuals and organisations alike.

Question: Is my data secure with JioTranslate?
Answer: Yes, JioTranslate prioritises user privacy and data security. Your personal information and translated data are safeguarded through encryption and other security measures, ensuring confidentiality and peace of mind while using the app.

Question: Can I store and access my translated conversations for future reference on JioTranslate?
Answer: Yes, JioTranslate allows users to store and access their translated conversations for future reference. The app provides options to save translated texts, voice recordings, and chat transcripts, enabling users to revisit their conversations at any time.

Question: How to play JioTambola?
Answer:
Tambola is a very simple game, in which numbers are called out on the top of the screen one at a time and the players need to strike the numbers on the ticket if it is a match. Listed below are the basic rules for playing the game: 
 
 Numbers 1-90 are randomly called out on the screen and the players strike the number by tapping the number on their ticket. 
 Tambola can be played throughout the day at 30-minute intervals. Each game starts afresh every half an hour, allowing participants the freedom to join as many games as they wish. 
 Each player gets 1 free ticket daily which needs to be claimed by answering a question correctly. 
 When the game begins, the numbers are drawn randomly and shown at the top of the screen. 
 If you are late in joining a game, you can still participate and strike off numbers from the ticket. 
 Click on the winning pattern shown below the ticket as soon as you achieve a winning combination. 
 If your claim is invalid, it will be considered as Bogie and your ticket will be cancelled for the day. 
 The time of making a claim is critical. If several people claim the same prize, then the first one to claim is eligible for the prize. 
 You can play with only 1 FREE ticket per game. 
 The game ends when all 90 numbers are called out or when all the prizes for that day are claimed (whichever comes first).

Question: How to claim a prize under JioTambola?
Answer:
You can claim a prize in the two ways listed below: 
 
 As soon as you complete any of the mentioned winning patterns on your ticket, tap on the winning combination shown below the ticket. 
 After you tap on the winning combination, your claim is recorded and our system starts with the verification. If you are in the first ‘n’ claims, you are eligible for a prize.

Question: When will I receive the prize for JioTambola?
Answer:
You can expect to receive your prize through one of the following methods: 
 
 Instant Coupon/Voucher:  If your prize is in the form of a coupon or voucher, it will be instantly updated in your "My Prizes" section. 
 Physical Prize:  In the case of a physical prize, you can anticipate its delivery within 14 days after the JioTambola team verifies your identity.

Question: How do we participate in Tambola?
Answer: Tambola is a simple game in which numbers are called out on the screen, one at a time, and in the case of a match, the Participants need to strike the numbers on their tickets. Numbers from 1 to 90 are announced randomly on the screen and the Participants need to strike out the numbers by tapping the numbers on their tickets.

Question: What are the winning patterns of Tambola?
Answer:
The winning patterns are as follows: 
  

 
 
 
 
 Early Five 
 First to strike off 5 numbers on the ticket and successfully claim the winning combination. 
 
 
 Top Line 
 First to strike off all the numbers on the top line and successfully claim the winning combination. 
 
 
 Middle Line 
 First to strike off all the numbers on the middle line and successfully claim the winning combination 
 
 
 Bottom Line 
 First to strike off all the numbers on the bottom line and successfully claim the winning combination 
 
 
 Corners 
 First to strike off the first and last numbers of the top line and bottom line and successfully claim the winning combination. 
 
 
 Full House 
 First to cross off all the numbers on their ticket and successfully claim the winning combination. 
 
 
 
 
 Note: A participant cannot win the same combination more than once.

Question: What are the elements/features of the game?
Answer:
The major elements of the game are as follows: 
 
 
 Golden Ticket 
 Play with Friends 
 
 
 In addition to the above features, the current enhancement includes the functionality of a Video Host, Watch and Earn and Daily Challenges. Please refer to the updated game interface for details on these features.

Question: What is the Golden Ticket?
Answer:
The Golden Ticket is purchased by burning Engage Points to participate in the game 
 
 
 During the game Period, the Participant is entitled to avail of only one (1) ticket per event which is active or scheduled upon answering the Quiz Question correctly. For the avoidance of doubt, the ticket may be generated anytime during the day for the subsequent event of the game. 
 Each ticket is active during the game Period only. 
 During the Game Period, certain numbers are randomly announced by the Company. Such announced numbers are notified on the game screen. 
 If the announced number matches any number present in the Ticket of the Participant, the Participant must actively tick off such numbers. 
 All Categories (Early-5, Top Line, Middle Line, Bottom Line, Corners, and Full House) are available in the game for a Participant to choose from within the Stipulated Time.

Question: What are Engage Points?
Answer:
These are points allocated by the Company as a part of its loyalty program. 
 
 
 The Company will award each Participant with 200 Engage Points at the beginning of the game for the first time. The Participant may earn more Engage Points by watching video ads made available in the game. 
 The following methodology will be followed to convert the existing points to Engage Points. 
 A conversion methodology of 20%, subject to a maximum cap of 3,000 Engage Points will be applied to the existing Tambola Points. Only whole values post-conversion will be considered. Decimal values will be ignored. For example, if the participant has 1001 coins, he/she will be credited with 200 Engage Points only and not 200.20 Engage Points. Question: How can we use the Play with Friends feature?
Answer: You can participate and use the ‘Play with Friends’ feature by creating a room and sharing the code with your friends. You can also join a Private Room by entering the Private Room Code shared by your friends.

Question: How can I create a Private Room?
Answer:
A Participant who invites friends to the ‘Private Room’ shall name the game and set up game details including an Entry Price to be placed by each participant to enter the ‘Private Room’ created. 
 The Entry Price for this feature is as follows: 10, 20, 50, 75, 100, 150, 300, 400, 500. 
 The Participants taking part in the Private Room are entitled to avail of one (1) Ticket upon answering the Quiz Question correctly.

Question: How many people can join the Private Room ?
Answer: There is no limit on the maximum count of people. However, a minimum of two players are required for a game.
